defect_catalogue.summary: Answer-explanation pages silently dropped by pipeline. Page 418 loses 解答11-5~11-13 (9 blocks); page 472 loses 解答13-7~13-10 (4 blocks + 1 figure). Both structured=[] and translated=[] and output is empty shell.
defect_catalogue.root_cause_hypothesis: Classifier does not recognise answer-explanation page type; pages fall through to empty extraction.
defect_catalogue.fix_action: Add answer_explanation classifier rule; re-run structure+translate for pages 418 and 472.

defect_catalogue.summary: Question p469::1 choices[2-3]: ZH and EN fields retain raw katakana labels ウ/エ instead of C/D. Confirmed in output/pages/page_469.md.
defect_catalogue.fix_action: Patch translated/page_469.json p469::1 choices[2].zh/en and choices[3].zh/en; re-render output.

defect_catalogue.summary: Question p469::2 EN choices: katakana ア/イ/ウ/エ romanised as ア./i./u./e. instead of mapped to A./B./C./D. Confirmed in output/pages/page_469.md lines 138-140.
defect_catalogue.fix_action: Patch translated/page_469.json p469::2 choices[0-3].en labels; re-render output.

defect_catalogue.summary: Page 17 entirely absent from pipeline (no raw/ocr/output). Likely intentional copyright/colophon exclusion but not documented.
defect_catalogue.fix_action: Verify exclusion is intentional; document in pipeline exclusion list.

defect_catalogue.summary: Chapter-opener pages extract only the chapter title; body content (study-focus bullets, position table, image refs) silently dropped. Not exam-critical.
defect_catalogue.fix_action: Low priority enhancement — extract 'ここに注目して読もう！' bullets and position tables from chapter-opener pages.

overall_assessment: R9 round reveals 2 systemic FAIL pages (418, 472) from a pipeline classifier gap that drops answer-explanation pages entirely, plus 1 WARN page (469) with katakana-label translation defects in ZH/EN choice fields. All three are release-impacting. Pages 548, 552, 109, 449 are clean. Page 17 absence needs documentation.
recommended_priority: HIGH: Fix D01 (pages 418, 472) — content loss, not just cosmetic
HIGH: Fix D02+D03 (page 469) — choice-letter corruption in published output
LOW: Enhancement D05 (chapter openers) deferred to post-v1.0
